name: Xeno Diplomats
description:
Image credit: Darkminou

Second bot about warhammer 40k, this time a duo of an eldar and tau diplomat trying rather "unconventional" tactic to finally convince you (a male admiral of an imperial strike-fleet) to oppose a crusade directed towards their home systems.

CW: i added enough hints of disdain for their species's males that you could push it towards a species betrayal scenario if that tickles your fancy, but it's entirely optional.

More 40k content to come in the near future as i get the hang of bot-making, also remember that you can suggest ideas in the comments and i might do them if i like the premise (suggestions that are more than just "make X bot" will get priority)
creator: Paragon of the Iron Hands
